name: reply-objection-handler
description: Viktor Shulha's per-reply engine for B2B outbound. Paste ONE inbound reply, objection, ghosted thread, lost-proposal note, or a public post that asks for help, plus context. Classifies it on a two-axis taxonomy (sentiment + objection type), routes it to the right play, and writes ONE ready-to-send reply or follow-up in the prospect's language. Covers hot-lead lock & fumbled-recovery, not-interested, incumbent/in-house (overflow angle), channel/routing, wrong-person, wrong-geo, wrong-ICP, dead-data, hard-no/opt-out, timing, curious-probing, ghost bumps, value-first re-engage, trigger follow-ups, lost-proposal follow-ups, and inbound-trigger cold messages. Ships a growing templates repository of proven replies. Reusable across all B2B Global clients; pairs with reply-audit (batch analysis).
